closureBasis: Retained families are admissible for fifth-gate only when their live-path role is explicitly classified as governance, ingress-only, compatibility-only, reference-only, or auxiliary-input rather than surviving as parallel product ownership.

checks.label: System-reform governance remains explicit in the active V26 family
checks.livePathRole: The canonical spec family and supplementary architecture/proof docs classify compatibility-bounded retained families rather than leaving them implicit.

checks.label: Retained webhook carriers are explicit ingress-only automation boundaries
checks.livePathRole: GitHub-triggered automation ingress may schedule work, but it does not own Bitcode Exchange state semantics.

checks.label: AssetPack run export keeps route compatibility explicit while Shippable output is primary
checks.livePathRole: Admitted path exports stay available for current callers while canonical Bitcode behavior remains elsewhere.

checks.label: Retained VCS agent layer remains explicit reference-only automation
checks.livePathRole: The VCS agent layer can support retained callers, but repository scope in the Bitcode product belongs to Connects and application-owned panels.

checks.label: Retained computer-use tooling is internal Read-measurement support only
checks.livePathRole: Computer use may supply server-flagged Read-measurement evidence under BITCODE_ENABLE_COMPUTER_USE_READ_MEASUREMENT, but it is not a Terminal option, implementation agent tool, Finish/Delivering tool, multi-agent substitute, or Bitcode state owner.

checks.label: Retained Jira tooling remains explicit reference-only ingress/integration support
checks.livePathRole: Jira tooling can contribute admitted integration context without becoming Bitcode Exchange ownership.

checks.label: Retained LSP infrastructure is repurposed as static Read/AssetPack measurement
checks.livePathRole: LSP tooling may remain only as replayable symbol/path/config/type evidence for Read measurement, AssetPack fit, and proof replay.

checks.label: Retained web-search carriers are Bitcode read-synthesis evidence support
checks.livePathRole: External search/research context may support discovery-phase read synthesis with source-attributed evidence, but it does not own canonical read, proof, mutation, delivery, Terminal, or Exchange truth.

checks.label: Retained danger-wall carrier is Bitcode read/AssetPack risk admission
checks.livePathRole: Danger-wall compatibility may admit, block, or require manual review before a retained pipeline phase proceeds, but it does not own canonical read, proof, mutation, delivery, or product semantics.
